transcript:
CALLER: Haan hello. Mujhe ek urgent appointment chahiye. Mera BP bahut high aa raha hai — 180/110. Kya aaj mil sakta hai?
AGENT: Ji yeh serious hai. Aaj ke liye emergency slot available hai. Aapka naam aur number?
CALLER: Bharat Sawant. 9823456710.
AGENT: Bharat ji, please aaj dopahar 2 baje aa jaiye. Dr. Ramesh Iyer aapko dekh lenge. Agar BP aur badhe ya chest pain, numbness jaise symptoms aaye toh seedha emergency mein aana.
CALLER: Theek hai, aata hoon. Koi medicines lena chahiye abhi?
AGENT: Main medical advice nahi de sakta, lekin please apni purani BP medicines agar hain toh saath laayein. Doctor decide karenge. Jaldi aaiye.
CALLER: Shukriya, aa raha hoon.
